meaning: n.[解]大腿骨,腿节,[动](昆虫的)腿节,股节
examples: It is called the femur and it goes from your hip to your knee.
And here is the femur of an elephant.
That's only a teeny, weeny little femur.
The find includes a complete hip and four leg bones (femur, fibula, tibiotarsus and hypotarsus).
The 17-year-old Ballyclare rider broke his left femur at Knockhill in July and is still short of full fitness.
